title: Punta Abreojos, Mexico
blurb: 80 smart buoys deployed in the spiny lobster fishery with Fedecoop. 600,000+ location payloads recorded. The largest connected gear deployment in history.

title: Nova Scotia, Canada (LFA35)
blurb: 60 smart buoys with Go Deep International across 5 fishing vessels. Protecting endangered North Atlantic Right Whale habitat from ghost gear.

title: Punta Eugenia & Isla Natividad, Mexico
blurb: Expanding in Baja California with upgraded inductive-charging buoys and hardened spindle designs refined from field feedback.

title: Gulf of Nicoya, Costa Rica
blurb: First Central American deployment. 5 gateways targeting 90% Gulf coverage, including vessel-based gateways and a lighthouse installation.
